---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new action, pattern, or coerce
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The need**
What are you trying to do that the MCP doesn't support today?

**Which tier? (see CONTRIBUTING.md)**
- [ ] Pattern doc (a recurring recipe / decision tree)
- [ ] Coerce / detector (a format the server should normalise or warn about)
- [ ] New action on an existing mega-tool
- [ ] New mega-tool (please justify the 3 gate questions in CONTRIBUTING.md)

**Proposed shape**
A rough sketch of the tool call / pattern you have in mind.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you tried with the existing tools.
